title: Comedian Nik Rabinowitz pushes boundaries
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Plettenberg Bay can...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Plettenberg Bay can prepare itself for a night of uproarious laughter as celebrated South African comedian Nik Rabinowitz brings his raunchy brand of humour to the Garden Route.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Plettenberg Bay can prepare itself for a night of uproarious laughter as celebrated South African comedian Nik Rabinowitz brings his raunchy brand of humour to the Garden Route."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With his most recent show, Rambunctious, Rabinowitz promises to deliver an unforgettable evening of comedy, sharing his unique perspectives on surviving the pandemic, throuples therapy, and an array of unfiltered thoughts that will have you in stitches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The highly anticipated comedy show will take place at The White House theatre on 11 May, offering locals and visitors an opportunity to escape the everyday routine and indulge in a night of pure entertainment. Rabinowitz's comedic prowess and razor-sharp wit are sure to leave the audience in fits of laughter.","html":"The highly anticipated comedy show will take place at The White House theatre on 11 May, offering locals and visitors an opportunity to escape the everyday routine and indulge in a night of pure entertainment. Rabinowitz's comedic prowess and razor-sharp wit are sure to leave the audience in fits of laughter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He will also be performing his show in Knysna on 10 May at The Moorings Premier Resort.","html":"He will also be performing his show in Knysna on 10 May at The Moorings Premier Resort."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets for the Knysna show are available on Quicket or in person at Cearn Hall (cash only).","html":"Tickets for the Knysna show are available on Quicket or in person at Cearn Hall (cash only)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To secure your spot, tickets can be purchased through Quicket.co.za. Alternatively, tickets are also available for purchase at The Old House Shop in Plett.","html":"To secure your spot, tickets can be purchased through Quicket.co.za. Alternatively, tickets are also available for purchase at The Old House Shop in Plett."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The show is organised by Sasha Events.","html":"The show is organised by Sasha Events."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nik Rabinowitz's comedic talent has garnered him widespread acclaim, and his performances have left audiences in tears of laughter across the country."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Known for his boundary-pushing humour and fearless commentary, Rabinowitz tackles taboo topics and societal norms, offering a fresh and hilarious perspective on the world we live in.","html":"Known for his boundary-pushing humour and fearless commentary, Rabinowitz tackles taboo topics and societal norms, offering a fresh and hilarious perspective on the world we live in."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
